name: Project Sparrow
short_description: Project Sparrow is an arena shooter focused on bow and arrow combat, fast-paced movement, and outmanoeuvring your opponent. Fight alongside your teammates in 2v2 and 3v3 or challenge them to a duel. Step into the arena and awaken the archer within.
detailed_description:
Fight along side your allies in this fantasy based arena PvP game, primarily focussed on archery combat. Focusing primarily on fast paced arena gameplay, providing the game with a perfect place for balance and iteration before exploring additional mechanics and gamemodes.


LOADOUTS

Each round, you can choose to replace your loadout with unique arrow types, movement abilities and utility options. Play each round the same or stay unpredictable and switch it up.



Select from different arrow types to fit your playstyle and outplay your opponents. Knock yourself back with explosive arrows, slow enemies with poison, stun then with lightning, block their vision with smoke, or burn them with fire.



Instantly change direction with a dash to outmanoeuvre and outplay your opponents. Correctly time a jump out of rolling to get the most speed and distance. Teleport to a new location with void rift to quickly disengage from a fight and reposition, or play aggressive by altering the direction you exit and always keep your opponents guessing.



Use pocket dust whilst in close proximity to briefly blind your opponent. Throw out a smoke bomb to block line of sight or gain a peak advantage. Quickly finish off a weak enemy by throwing your knife into them.

CLOSE RANGE COMBAT MECHANICS

Meleeing whilst in the air will cause you to kick instead of punch, knocking players backwards. If you kick them into a wall they will be briefly stunned. You can parry enemy melee attacks with 'F'. Knocking them backwards and applying a daze effect, making it hard for them to move.

NETCODE

Experience state of the art netcode. Featuring client-side prediction, lag compensation and instant replays (killcams & round ending kills!). You can count on us to make sure you're game experience is the best it can be. We're always looking to improve, so let us know if you see anything that seems off!

CUSTOM GAMES & DEDICATED SERVERS

Boot up a custom game with friends, or host a tournament. Choose from playing arena based modes from 1v1s to 3v3s or boot up a deathmatch. We have full spectator controls ready to go! Dedicated servers supported around the world.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Turkish, Arabic, Indonesian, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
